Text.Page:
Hey! I have a favor to ask!

Today is my brother's birthday. Mine too, so to speak. We awakened in Pora Elinu and stuck together ever since."Happy birthday."
Thanks! Now, my brother {@LinkCreature:225#2002$$Shurin} is in charge of planning the party this year. If I teleport you to him, can you find out if things are ready?

{@LinkCreature:225#2001$$Maoran} sent you? Curse his impatience!

{@LinkCreature:225#2000$$Deirin} ordered special cookies from Popolion, but I don't know if they'll make it here in time.

Could you head to Cathedral Redbout and ask {@LinkCreature:225#2000$$Deirin} about the cookies?

Gah! I wish they'd stop worrying. They're fine. I left them in a crate at the Crusader Camp.

Tell {@LinkCreature:225#2001$$Maoran} not to worry so much!

Heehee! Cookies for the party!

If you're not too busy slaying Scions, you should stop by later! Those cookies are to die for.

Well, you know what I mean.
